title: Trump says U.S. will 'go right back to dropping bombs' if he doesn't like Iran deal
summary_full: U.S. President Donald Trump said Wednesday at the G7 conference that the U.S. will "go right back to dropping bombs" if he doesn't like the Iran deal.
summary_public: U.S. President Donald Trump said Wednesday at the G7 conference that the U.S. will "go right back to dropping bombs" if he doesn't like the Iran deal.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump says U.S. will 'go right back to dropping bombs' if he doesn't like Iran deal
